title: Evidence of early years providers’ finances from a 2024 survey
body: "This report uses data from the 2024 survey of childcare and early years providers to analyse provider finances, including:   the ratio of providers’ income to their cost (a measure of provider profitability) variation in providers’ unit costs and staff hourly pay patterns in the hourly fees charged by providers to parents and hourly funding rate received by providers from their local authorities  "

taxons.title: Funding and finance for childcare providers
